content_of_post_to_comment: So im guy, but lately I’ve been feeling either ambivalent or disgusted towards most men. when I see them complaining about something, I just get this feeling of fatigue, and I want to say like ‘grow up you fat ugly pussy’, when I would not say the same thing to a woman, I’d be much more sympathetic. what could this mean and how can I help it?
comment: The part that stands out is that you’re not just annoyed by complaining, you’re applying a completely different standard based on whether it’s a man or a woman. Sometimes that happens when you’ve started associating traits you dislike in yourself with other men in general. I’d be more curious about where the disgust is coming from than the annoyance itself.
